name: Possible File Staging Related to Cityworks Directories
description: Detects events that involves enumeration and staging of files to Cityworks directory which can potentially be used for data exfiltration on vulnerable Cityworks products.

filterSets.name: Suspicious Enumeration Activity Related to Cityworks Application
Suspicious Copying of Files to Cityworks Directory

author: Shaun Galura & Gerardo III Jonieca
